programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Take a journey through the eyes of catfish, ocelots, and other native creatures with narrator Matthew McConaughey. Celebrate the Lone Star State’s landscapes and wildlife, and learn how crucial conservation efforts can save Texas’ unique habitats.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E3 - Africa

programme.title: E3 - Risk and Reward
programme.desc: The drought is finally over, but traversing the forest for food is still a gamble. See some leaders take the risk, leaving home territories undefended to feast on a cicada boom. When they return, trespassers are ready for a fight.

programme.title: E9 - The Telltale Creek
programme.desc: People in charming Hope Mills, are on edge when a high school freshman vanishes while on her way to meet a friend. When she turns up dead three weeks later, the community rallies to flush out the killer.

programme.title: E4 - Women Who Kill - Georgina Henshaw
programme.desc: Chef Philip Rolph was besotted with waitress Georgina Henshaw. But Phil realised she was using him for his money, and Georgina bragged to a friend that she was planning to kill him.

programme.desc: A career criminal and first-time arrestee bond in custody; an expecting father faces the prospect of missing his child's birth, and a 20-year-old aspiring model gets a taste of the inside of a jail cell.

programme.desc: Nusfjord Arctic Resort is a preserved 200-year-old cod fishing village in the Lofoten Islands of Norway. Working alongside the dedicated team, Monica and Rob learn to appreciate the difficulties of running a high-end resort in such an extreme environment.

programme.desc: Monica and Rob discover what it takes to work at a wildlife reserve hotel in South Africa, which seeks to balance keeping both the animals and guests safe.

programme.desc: Donal brings us four internationally inspired-bowls - a Citrus Pork Bowl; a Chicken Katsu Bowl; Tomato & Chickpea Orecchiette Soup; and a Middle Eastern Lamb Bowl.

programme.title: E3 - Hidden Escapes
programme.desc: In New York we visit a hotel hidden airside amongst the hustle and bustle of the John F Kennedy airport - the TWA Hotel. In Finnish Lapland we venture to the deep snow-capped forest of the Urho Kkonen National Park.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E12 -Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E13 -Food Fight!
programme.desc: It’s the return of the Top Chef Junior Food Fight! The gloves are off as the final four chefs compete in a head-to-head food fight in a boxing ring and a stadium full of fans & family members cheering them on. Over four rounds of culinary battle, the winning chefs advance and square off in the finals for the championship belt, while the losing chefs face off in a final cook for their culinary lives. Also, the tables turn when our judges pair up and step into the ring to compete in a dried chili battle of their own. The chefs take the judges’ position and hijinks ensue, but it’s not all fun and games. The competition heats up again, and so does the heat intensity of the peppers as the rounds advance. Which chefs will prove they have what it takes to cook when the pressure is turned all the way up? The heat is definitely on!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2E22 -Hot Spring Fever
programme.desc: Raj and Smason fight over a secret hotsprings only to end up shriveled raisins from soaking in it too long.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2E23 -Camp Samson
programme.desc: When Samson feels left out from the group, he is determined to make them all remember him . . . somehow!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E7 -Frag The Dog
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney launch Mr. J's prized bowling trophy into the neighbor's yard.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva, a kind-hearted young woman, discovers she is the true heir to the wealthy Cortes family. As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: TV Patrol Global Edition
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.title: E17 - In Chinon (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's architecture and a prominent figure of the region, Rabelais.

programme.title: E17 - In Chinon (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's architecture and a prominent figure of the region, Rabelais.

programme.title: E8 - Raamin Samiyi
programme.desc: Pastry chef Raamin Samiyi, originally from New York, is known as the king of donuts in Paris. After his first trip to Reunion Island, he created the Bourbon, a donut paying tribute to the ''intense island,'' filled with vanilla and dusted with coffee.

programme.title: E17 - In Chinon (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's architecture and a prominent figure of the region, Rabelais.

programme.title: E4 - Complete And Energy Efficient Transformation Of A House
programme.desc: Off to Schaerbeek to discover the transformation of a terraced house which, before the renovation work, was the oldest home on the street! Also featured: the Steel Sauvage ironwork workshop; the Murtoli estate in southern Corsica; repairing and repainting a brick wall.

programme.title: E17 - In Chinon (2)

programme.title: E18 - In Chinon (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's truffles and its cheeses.

programme.title: E12 - Lvmh At Salle Pleyel/White Chocolate/Scad Lacoste/Sequins
programme.desc: LVMH drops its bags in the Salle Pleyel, presenting all its skills and craftsmanship. All about white chocolate. An American school in the Luberon: SCAD Lacoste trains the artists of tomorrow, guided by fashion designer Julien Fournier. Sparkle and glitter is back in fashion: how to wear sequins.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!
programme.desc: From the costume workshop to the sets and the accessory stockroom, a tour of the Liege Opera where ''Traviata'' is performed. Also featuring director Jean-Marie Poire, landscape designer Alexandre Vandiest, Patrick Syen's Bentleys, and soprano Louise Foor.

programme.title: E18 - In Chinon (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's truffles and its cheeses.

programme.title: E43 - Sweet Truffle Recipe In Frontenay Sur Dive
programme.desc: Alongside two passionate truffle growers, Jacky and Hubert, Alessandra Montagne traces the captivating history of Perigord black truffle in the region. On the menu: a truffle Mont Blanc dessert.

programme.title: E18 - In Chinon (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's truffles and its cheeses.

programme.title: E11 - Mathias Bensimon/Haider Ackermann/Salome Cousseau
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren try to uncover the truth behind a murderer's claim of demonic possession.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: An unlikely love triangle teaches three individuals the value of love and life.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren try to uncover the truth behind a murderer's claim of demonic possession.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Secret Message!
programme.desc: Eric learns that, with a little science, you can bring out all the colours that make up the black ink in felt tip markers. He separates the colours using chromatography. This gives him a way to write secret messages.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: Trip to Australia
programme.desc: Zoe bumps her head on a metal light fitting and is looking for medicine to relieve the pain of the headache. In Australia, some people treat headaches with plants. Our heroes will have to meet William and Japaljarri, and they will be surprised!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Haunted Beauty Salon
programme.desc: Ms. Bell's wedding is in peril when a ghost scares away the customers from the beauty salon where everyone is getting ready for the ceremony. But Addison thinks the rumbling and drafts might have natural causes.

programme.title: The Invisible Theft
programme.desc: Cleopatra uses invisibility paint to catch the superhero Sprinter, but she forgets that he can still use his superpower even if his head is invisible.

programme.title: Pilou and the Scooter Chase
programme.desc: It's Pilou's birthday, and the Buffycats surprise her with a kick scooter! Pilou is super happy, and her dog friend Terry helps her learn how to ride it. But the cat catchers trap the Buffycats! Will Pilou manage to save her furry fellows?

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Gorilla
programme.desc: Henry meets a Gorilla. His next door neighbour, Tiger, is feeling a little under the weather so Henry becomes a Vet to help him feel better.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Grandad Badger tells Binah an epic tale about the time he chased a seal around the world. Red challenges Grey to keep quiet for an entire episode. And Fiona Fox finally gets a moment of peace as Orla and Meabh rest calmly in her arms.

programme.title: Space Bots
programme.desc: When venturing into deep space to discover new worlds, robots are needed to first explore these extreme environments. Host Emily Calandrelli shows us robots that are leading the way, both to Mars, and other destinations in the future.

programme.title: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Ice dancer Josh has a new partner, Lucy, but they have just weeks to pull off their first public performance. Ice hockey player Rais receives an offer he can't refuse, and figure skaters Josh and Kloe are preparing for a big international competition.

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: The Proteus Factor
programme.desc: Proteus traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria.

programme.title: A Magic Curve Ball
programme.desc: In so called ‘string art', straight lines are drawn that look like curved lines. In this episode, Eric tries to do the same. What mathematical principles form the basis of string art and will Eric succeed?

programme.title: Artists of the Environment
programme.desc: Philippe travels to spectacular places on earth. He explores the different ways an environmental painter, sculptor, photographer and craftsman blend nature with art.

programme.title: The Proteus Factor
programme.desc: Proteus traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria.

programme.title: Secret Message!
programme.desc: Eric learns that, with a little science, you can bring out all the colours that make up the black ink in felt tip markers. He separates the colours using chromatography. This gives him a way to write secret messages.

No Evs Without China?
programme.desc: If you dominate EV battery manufacturing, you dominate electromobility. China is building one gigafactory after another, while Europe struggles with political uncertainty, lack of know-how, and large-scale projects that end up delayed or cancelled.

programme.title: No Evs Without China?
programme.desc: If you dominate EV battery manufacturing, you dominate electromobility. China is building one gigafactory after another, while Europe struggles with political uncertainty, lack of know-how, and large-scale projects that end up delayed or cancelled.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: The Worldwide Materials Transition
programme.desc: From Venezuela's extra heavy crude oil to Trump's focus on Greenland's rare earths to Germany's F60 steel giants and illegal gold mines in Indonesia: How raw materials impact landscapes, people, and politics.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today's Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: E12 - Spy Games
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Keep Chasing: Hunt
programme.desc: After a high-ranking North Korean official requests asylum, KCIA Foreign Unit chief Park Pyong-ho (LEE Jung Jae) and Domestic Unit chief Kim Jung-do (JUNG Woo Sung) are tasked with uncovering a North Korean spy, known as Donglim, who is deeply embedded within their agency. When the spy begins leaking top secret intel that could jeopardize national security, the two units are each assigned to investigate each other. In this tense situation where if they cannot find the mole, they may be accused themselves, Pyong-ho and Jung-do slowly start to uncover the truth. In the end, they must deal with an unthinkable plot to assassinate the South Korean president...

programme.title: Beijing Rocks
programme.desc: Yang Yin, a starry-eyed dance girl in search of love; Ping Lu, an impetuous Beijing Rock and Roll singer in search of recognition; and Michael, a Hong Kong-born and overseas-educated composer in search of himself. Three people from different walks of life are...

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Home Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ for some fun learning adventures at home! First, TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in some amazing science experiments, from making slime to building an erupting volcano! Then, it's time to head to the kitchen, where YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The at-home fun continues as the kids discover a cassette player & record all the cool sounds they hear around the house!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: Crystal Fortune Run
programme.desc: Few years ago, Sergeant Kong in a mission to capture the head of the “East Rail Corporation” met with Yip Fung who killed the head of East Rail instead. Kong shot at Yip but missed and only a finger was left in the scene. Kong suspected that Yip might be a robot and thus kept a close watch on her, but later turned that he fell in love with Yip. One night, Ko Kit accompanied with four assistants launched a campaign to steal the “Crystal” in East Rail Main Building. Ko was successful in breaking through the security system and got the crystal but at the same time Yip also rushed to join in the robbery...

programme.title: The Kung Fu Scholar
programme.desc: Lun was a smart scholar who liked to do petty tricks. Lau had been practicing martial arts. Lun and Lau formed an odd couple of school and had small disputes all the time.

programme.title: Lucky Stars Go Places
programme.desc: The lucky stars reunite again. Having the new members joined in, they are playful and frolicsome as usual. This time, their mission is to investigate a case of international ammunition trade that involves two gangs. One is the Japanese underworld society that holds many stolen diamonds, and another one is the mysterious terrorists who own an enormous amount of ammunition. Let's see how the lucky stars overcome the danger and problem.

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Muscles, Kidstuff, Fung, and the gang taking a well-needed vacation in Thailand courtesy of the Hong Kong police department. Also on the trip is police inspector Woo on orders to track down a list of drug dealers from informant Ma. Unfortunately, Ma gets whacked by a Thai crime lord, but he tells Woo as he draws his last breath that he mailed the list to his friend in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, Muscles and the gang are shaking down Lau, a drug dealer who, it turns out, is being targeted by the same baddies that killed Ma...

programme.title: Aces Go Places IV
programme.desc: The invention of a prism - a special brain stimulant, gets King Kong and Inspector into a series of dangerous adventures. The lives of Inspector Ho and her son, Baldy Junior are also threatened by the villains...

programme.title: Good Times, Bed Times
programme.desc: Carrie left Raymond not because he had too many other women, but only because he slept with another woman right on the bed Carrie has always been obsessed with. After the break up, she begged for ownership of the bed she's gotten used to. Carrie was assigned to follow the story of city's celebrated super cop, Paul Ko. While exchanging fire he was shot at by an AK-47 and become a sexual impotent. During the process of interviewing, Carrie has fallen to Paul. Raymond is being considered for a promotion to district court, his superiors request for him to stay away from the night-life and women. In the thick of this difficult celibate period, an 18 year old girl called Tabby barges into Raymond's life...

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Muscles, Kidstuff, Fung, and the gang taking a well-needed vacation in Thailand courtesy of the Hong Kong police department. Also on the trip is police inspector Woo on orders to track down a list of drug dealers from informant Ma. Unfortunately, Ma gets whacked by a Thai crime lord, but he tells Woo as he draws his last breath that he mailed the list to his friend in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, Muscles and the gang are shaking down Lau, a drug dealer who, it turns out, is being targeted by the same baddies that killed Ma...

programme.title: Tiger Cage III
programme.desc: James and John are working in the Commercial Crime Bureau. Jointly they look into a case of which the suspect is an influential rich business man called Lee. James has a girl friend called Suki who is working for Wong, Lee's accountant. One night, in a party holding by Lee, John hears by chance the internal tips on a stock that Lee and his staff are talking about. John thus takes out all his saving and buys that stock. In the meantime, since Wong is murdered and James is also assaulted and seriously burnt, the case is closed under great pressure. On the other hand, the price of the stock which John has invested heavily slides. John is thus deeply depressed. Six months later, James has been much recovered under the care of two old men. At this time, Suki has climbed up to be a senior and important person in Wong's firm. Even Lee becomes a blocking stone in her eyes...

The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo

E7 - 新成員告五人加盟助力
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E13 - 露人團收官「瘋」神
programme.desc: 潮流露營全面升級，發起人陳偉霆將帶領魏大勛、王琳凱、楊迪、尹正、張顏齊組成「露」人團，他們將邀請5組不同社交關系的飛行好友團展開社交露營，在5個夢幻營地完成5次主題露營，構建5種理想生活畫像，共赴自然美好。

E46
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E41
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。
